data_coverage_summary: Infor WMS APIs has public documentation that indicates inventory and warehouse execution across inventory items, locations, pick tasks, shipments. Public platform documentation is available.
buyer_guidance: Use this API family for warehouse and inventory system integration where stock, location, and fulfillment state must be synchronized. Infor should be treated as a rest api surface for inventory and warehouse execution.
overview: Public documentation reviewed for Infor WMS APIs indicates Public platform documentation is available. The documented surface aligns with inventory and warehouse execution and covers inventory items, locations, pick tasks, shipments. Asset data is Supported. Telemetry data is Unsupported. Writeback is Supported.

available_data.description: The public documentation indicates inventory visibility and warehouse execution workflows spanning locations, stock records, and fulfillment tasks.
relevant_operations: read warehouse locations and stock state

ingest_considerations: The public source for Infor WMS APIs is documentation-oriented, so live access still depends on vendor-issued credentials, tenant configuration, or customer enablement.
This row is modeled as inventory and warehouse execution, so downstream integrations should scope data collection and writeback around those documented business workflows.
No exact public machine-readable JSON or YAML artifact was confirmed during this pass, so the documentation URL remains the primary evidence anchor.
